# BIT RAGE SYSTEMS — Copilot Instructions

## GitButler Auto-Commit
When you generate code or modify files, run the gitbutler update branches MCP tool (`gitbutler_update_branches`) to automatically commit and manage branch state.

## Project Context
- BIT RAGE SYSTEMS = Digital Labour (execution) + Super Agency (orchestration)
- Master launcher: `bitrage.py` — the ONE command to rule them all
- 25 DL agents + 40+ SA agents, C-Suite (AXIOM/LEDGR/VECTIS), NERVE daemon
- Super Agency integrated at `super_agency/` (full codebase)
- API at `https://bitrage-labour-api-production.up.railway.app`
- Python 3.12, FastAPI, deployed on Railway
- LLM providers: OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, Grok (keys in .env)
- Resonance bridges: NCC (governance), NCL (brain), AAC (bank)
